headline: Helvetia Growth Partners settles minor reporting dispute with FINMA
summary: A co-investment vehicle resolved an administrative late-filing matter with the regulator; no findings of misconduct against individuals. Generally considered immaterial for KYC.
note: Low-severity, resolved administrative matter. Included to show the LLM can downgrade non-material noise.

headline: Local article names an "S. Keller" in an unrelated fraud case
summary: A 2019 article mentions an "S. Keller" in an unrelated fraud case. The date of birth and nationality do not match the client. Most likely a name overlap.
note: Name-only match. Low confidence. Needs a human to confirm the date of birth and nationality, then it can be cleared.

headline: Slovak businessman named in cross-border money-laundering case
